name: Sprint Churn Rate %
query:
SELECT
    ROUND(
        (
            (
                COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'sprint_added_sp_sum' THEN v_facts.value ELSE 0 END), 0) +
                COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'sprint_removed_sp_sum' THEN ABS(v_facts.value) ELSE 0 END), 0)
            )
            / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN v_facts.calc_code = 'velocity_planned_sp' THEN v_facts.value ELSE 0 END), 0)
            * 100
        )::numeric
    , 1) AS churn_rate_pct
FROM metrics.v_facts
LEFT JOIN clean_jira.sprints
  ON v_facts.entity_id = sprints.id::text
  AND v_facts.entity_type = 'sprint'
WHERE v_facts.calc_code IN ('sprint_added_sp_sum', 'sprint_removed_sp_sum', 'velocity_planned_sp')
  [[AND {{project_key}}]]
  [[ AND {{issue_type}} -- ]] AND v_facts.slice_rule_id IS NULL
  [[AND {{sprint_name}}]]
  [[ AND sprints.start_date::date >= {{sprint_start_date}} ]]
